title: helichrysum hyblaeum
intro: Helichrysum hyblaeum, also known as the Immortelle or Helichrysum, is a flowering plant native to the Middle East and North Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Helichrysum hyblaeum include reducing stress and anxiety, improving skin health, and supporting the immune system, among others. Helichrysum hyblaeum is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be applied topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
